title: Refund Policy
intro: The following terms apply to refunds for the use of Readya services:

sections.title: 1. General Terms
content: Payments made for Readya services are generally non-refundable.

sections.title: 2. Refund Eligibility
content: Refunds may be issued in the following cases:
A technical issue that makes the service unusable
